title: limeum viscosum subsp. nummulifolium
intro: Limeum viscosum subsp. nummulifolium, also known as sticky limeum or nummulifolious sticky limeum, is a subspecies of the Limeum viscosum plant, which belongs to the Limoniaceae family and is native to tropical Africa. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions such as eczema, acne, and dermatitis due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Limeum viscosum subsp. nummulifolium include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and promote wound healing. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties.
